# Brand Ingestion Checklist

- [ ] Sources stored
- [ ] Website fetched or failure logged
- [ ] Documents parsed
- [ ] Videos transcribed where available
- [ ] Offer extracted
- [ ] Audience extracted
- [ ] Proof points extracted
- [ ] Visual identity extracted
- [ ] Brand Brain QA complete
